title: stelis galeola
intro: Stelis galeola, also known as the yellow orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stelis galeola include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as an anti-aging agent and antioxidant. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
